channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Can Yogurt Help Prevent Colon Cancer?
Guselkumab (Tremfya) Shows Stronger Evidence for Joint Protection in Psoriatic Arthritis
item.description: The FDA expanded guselkumab's label to include evidence that it can slow structural joint damage progression in adults with psoriatic arthritis.

item.title: Common Walking Mistakes and How to Fix Them
item.description: Walking is a low-impact exercise, but incorrect shoes, pace, or routine can hinder progress and increase injury risk.

item.title: 11 Natural Ways to Lower Your Cortisol Levels
